description: Customers can now use their own threat lists to add SHA-256 file hash IOCs and GuardDuty will generate Execution:Runtime/MaliciousFileExecuted.Custom findings on them. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/guardduty/latest/ug/guardduty_upload-lists.html for instructions on uploading threat lists.
short_description: Customers can now use their own threat lists to add SHA-256 file hash IOCs and GuardDuty will generate Execution:Runtime/MaliciousFileExecuted.Custom
